title: Weskerson's Nature
description: Transform your gameplay with custom 3D flora. Say goodbye to 2D textures and hello to lush, volumetric flowers and fungi!
body:
Upgrade your overworld with these expansive 3d flora! This pack adds custom 3d Flowers with their own custom 3D item models!

This pack covers a range of different flora and fungi, making your overworld and nether (soon the end too ;P) livelier than ever.


<center>

![terms of use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e49dca975d7080125a17335fd8ebfbca4293e487.png)
